powerQ: What Circumstance do you find yourself in?
What tools or trappings of your position or station do you carry?
Who can you call upon or relate to thanks to your Circumstance?
What social skills have you developed as part of your Circumstance?
How can you exploit your Circumstance to get out of trouble?
Where do you go to be with others of similar social status?
What special right or privilege comes with your Circumstance?
What knowledge or knack is common to people in your position?
How have you learned to overcome your Circumstances?
What is the motto or creed you’ve adopted?
weakQ: What’s the biggest challenge you face due to your unique position?
What aspect of your Circumstance do others scorn, shun, or detest?
What kinds of places or situations are off limits to you?
How do others commonly mistreat you?
questIdeas: A desire to prove your worth despite your status.
An ambition to become the most successful or archetypal member of your role.
A binding norm or code you adhere to due to your position.
Circumstance.concept: What’s interesting about where you have found yourself? What social position do you possess and how long have you had it? What makes you a stereotypical example of your circumstance? What makes you stand apart? Are you a victim of circumstance or did you choose your lot in life?

powerQ: Who or what are you Devoted to?
What action do you most commonly take in service of your Devotion?
What feeling does your Devotion fill you with that you can call upon?
What possession do you carry or have that symbolizes your Devotion?
Where or when can you connect with your Devotion?
What does the object of your Devotion often help you with?
What quality do you possess that best exemplifies your dedication?
What approach do you take in social situations due to your Devotion?
What ethos or saying do you aspire to live up to in your dedication?
What useful ritual or habit do you have to show your Devotion?
weakQ: What are you blind to because of your Devotion?
What duties do you have that frequently need your time or resources?
What unsightly or destructive behavior can your Devotion evoke in you?
What often threatens the object of your Devotion?
questIdeas: A simple statement of your Devotion and what you feel towards them or it.
Something you hope to gain by your Devotion, the one thing you cling to that makes all this sacrifice worthwhile.
A task you must complete for your Devotion, such as a ritual, a pilgrimage, or an act of heroism.
Devotion.concept: What is the most important thing to you, personally? How did you end up caring so much about this person, group, or ideal? Do you chafe under the needs, demands, or ethos of who or what you are devoted to? How far would you go to protect that which you are devoted to?

powerQ: What past event or existence has shaped your life?
What major lesson did you learn from your Past?
What clothing or equipment have you kept with you?
What memento do you still hold on to?
What person or people from your Past can you still call upon?
What situation from your Past are you skilled at dealing with?
What reputation have you earned for yourself locally?
What secret skill or technique did you pick up?
What quality of character have you developed from your experiences?
What particular culture, clique, or people do you connect with now?
weakQ: What ugly secret do you keep, connected to your Past?
What person or group from your Past is still out to get you?
What past situations bring back painful or unwanted memories?
What physical or mental marks has your Past left on you?
questIdeas: A lesson learned or oath taken in your old life to which you now adhere.
An aspiration to recover what you’ve lost, or to leave your Past behind.
A question from your Past that haunts you to which you must find an answer.
Past.concept: What life event or past experience shaped who you are? Why did you leave it behind, or how did you move past it? What repercussions of that experience still haunt you? Are you trying to return to the better days, or hoping to leave the past behind?

powerQ: What do your People call themselves or one of their members?
What physical attribute common to your People serves you best?
What skill, technique, or trick is practiced by your People?
What item of cultural significance do you carry with you?
What knowledge is shared among your People?
Where are your People from, commonly found, or most comfortable?
When in need, who among your People can you call for aid?
What is the combat style or typical weapon used by your People?
What useful quality about you is very typical of your People?
What unique or supernatural ability do your People possess?
weakQ: What plight or difficulty of your People most affects you?
What often causes strife or discord among your People?
When are you hindered by your cultural ways or inherited traits?
How or by whom are your People most prejudiced against?
questIdeas: The ethos or “way” of your People, or a saying that summarizes it.
An aspiration to raise your People up or overcome their plight.
A goal to fulfill a prophecy or folktale of your People.
People.concept: existence, or a stain you’re trying to wash off? What about your clothing style, items, or physique makes you stand out? What is more important to you, the traditions themselves or the lessons they teach? When in a bind, how do you turn to your native abilities and beliefs?

powerQ: What Personality trait is most central to you?
In what situations does your Personality truly shine?
How do you influence other people?
What item or garment best expresses your personal style?
What interpersonal or social skill or talent do you possess?
When in trouble or stressed, what emotion or behavior do you turn to?
What is an unexpected but useful facet of your Personality?
How do you support or help others?
How do you resist influence or stay true to yourself?
How can your unique worldview help you figure things out?
weakQ: In what situations does your Personality get you into trouble?
What is an ugly or unfortunate aspect of your Personality?
What unwanted behavior does your Personality push you toward?
Who finds you, or who do you find, irksome or loathsome?
questIdeas: A personal motto, rhyme, or quote that encompasses your core worldview or approach.
Something you must do to feel true to yourself.
A goal you have set for yourself due to your Personality.
Personality.concept: What are you like? What made you this way? How well does your personality mesh with others’? Is it all a show you’re putting on for the world? And if so, what’s beneath it?

powerQ: What Skill or Trade are you good at?
What specific technique within this Skill set is your specialty?
What tool, equipment, or outfit is a staple of your Trade?
Who most respects, values, or requires your abilities?
What unusual or inventive application have you found for your Skill?
In what conditions can you work with the most confidence and efficiency?
How do you reduce the risk of failure, harm, or poor outcome?
What are you more aware of or know about, thanks to your Skill?
Who assists you in practicing your Skill or Trade?
What conviction or emotion motivates you to practice your Skill?
weakQ: What challenge or feat is quite beyond your everyday ability?
What conditions make it harder for you to practice your Skill or Trade?
How does your practice or talent bias your perceptions or interactions?
Where or when are those of your Trade unwelcome or unwilling to work?
questIdeas: The motivation to practice your Skill or Trade, such as to earn a living.
A professional standard you are held to or a line you try not to cross.
A desire to become much better at this than you are presently.
Skill or Trade.concept: CRAFT + HOBBY + TALENT OR KNACK + PROFESSION + PRACTICED OR REHEARSED ABILITY You have a skill or ability you are somewhat good at, developed through practice or daily application over time. Or perhaps you’ve acquired a trade, which is more than a single honed skill – it’s a set of related techniques and understandings, with its own role in society. You might have learned a profession from a mentor, put to work in your family’s farm or shop, or practiced by yourself due to personal interest or out of necessity. You have become fairly good at what you do, and can trust your skills to carry you

powerQ: What is your most defining Trait?
What is a specific or common way you put this Trait to use?
How is this Trait helping you keep safe?
What item or ally helps you get the most of your Trait?
What can you do that only those with this Trait can?
In which situation is this Trait especially useful to you?
What skill have you developed to make the most of this gift?
What do you notice, sense, or understand that most other people cannot?
How can you perform, show off, or be creative with your Trait?
How do you hide this Trait, when you need to?
weakQ: What happens when you overuse your Trait?
Who around you resents, covets, or mocks your Trait?
What is the most obvious vulnerability or misuse of this Trait?
When is your Trait utterly useless?
questIdeas: A belief you developed through trusting and using your Trait.
A behaviour you adopted to emphasize or to downplay your Trait.
A goal relating to understanding the source of your power or growing your abilities.
Trait.concept: When did you first discover or become aware of your trait? How reliant on this trait are you? Do you neglect developing relevant skills, or is it so good you simply don’t need to? Who around you came to appreciate or resent this trait? What can this trait help you achieve?

powerQ: What is the task, goal, or ideal you have taken on so dutifully?
What quality of character is crucial in taking up this Duty?
How do you proclaim your Duty or convince others of its importance?
Who or what is at your beck and call thanks to your commitment?
What useful resource or tool is needed for the fulfillment of this Duty?
What legal or social privileges or exceptions apply to you?
What are the arms, armor, or trappings of your Duty?
Where do you patrol, hold office, or carry your Duties?
How do you interact favorably with the patron(s) of this Duty?
What keeps you on the right track when you despair or falter?
weakQ: Who or what opposes you on this task?
What personal failing sets you back on the path to fulfill your Duty?
Who is your rival or challenger for this responsibility?
What negative emotion does your Duty bring up?
questIdeas: The oath you have taken or the belief that drives you.
The manner in which you conduct yourself in order to maintain your Duty.
A decree or quest you’ve been given by a higher authority.
Duty.concept: OATH + GRAND OR DAUNTING QUEST + UNDERTAKING + RESPONSIBILITY You have undertaken a task or committed yourself to an ideal with an earnestness that most cannot muster. You might have stepped up to this challenge or had it thrust upon you – either way, it is now yours. Before you lies a difficult task, a path rife with tribulations, or the heavy burden of responsibility, and you must steel yourself if you are to accomplish what you set out to achieve. Luckily, such an undertaking often means you have the backing of an organization, a person of interest, a faction, or even a deity who may believ

powerQ: What gives you power and Influence over others?
What is the most common task or service people do for you?
Who are your followers, servants, foot soldiers, or agents?
What is the most potent way in which you exert Influence?
In what domain is your Influence the strongest?
What assets or benefits have you gained thanks to your Influence?
Who is the most susceptible to your Influence?
How do you grow the reach of your Influence?
How do you dismantle others’ resistance?
How do you protect yourself from others’ influence?
weakQ: Who resists, ignores, or is immune to your Influence?
What do you do that undermines your own power?
Who does your Influence cause you to clash with?
What lies outside of your sphere of Influence?
questIdeas: The reason or motivation for which you’ve accumulated all this Influence.
The attitude or worldview that allowed you to gain power or maintain it.
A standard of power you measure yourself by.
A decree or quest you’ve been given by a higher authority.
Influence.concept: KEY POSITION + AUTHORITY OVER OTHERS + CONTACTS & AGENTS + PERSONAL POWER You are an individual of considerable import, whether publicly or behind the scenes, and as such you command a degree of power and influence. This could be owing to your impressive presence or winning character, but it just as well could be a result of years of scheming, making the right connections, or influencing others in unsavory or even unnatural ways. What is the nature of the influence you possess? Do others follow you willingly or begrudgingly? What did you have to undertake or sacrifice to get to this position?

powerQ: What special Knowledge do you possess?
What subject do you specialize in within your body of Knowledge?
What can be understood, analyzed, or explained with your Knowledge?
What is a practical application of your Knowledge?
What advantage do you have over those lacking your Knowledge?
How do you protect, store, or preserve your Knowledge?
What have you learned that is adjacent to your Knowledge?
What do you always carry with you, because of what you know?
What is your method of collection, discovery, or research?
What is a new frontier of Knowledge you are beginning to explore?
weakQ: What are the biggest holes in your body of Knowledge?
What is beyond fathom, obscured, or confusing to you?
Who seeks to steal, take, or deny this Knowledge from you?
What hurdles stand in your way when you attempt to apply your Knowledge?
questIdeas: A desire to discover more and deepen your Knowledge.
A warning about this Knowledge, why it must be kept secret, or preserved.
The impetus that drove you to learn all that you did.
Knowledge.concept: What is it that you know that most people do not? How did you come across this knowledge? How did discovering this knowledge change you and your perception of the world? Who else seeks this knowledge? Do they know you have it?

powerQ: What do you call someone who has your Prodigious Ability?
What is a secondary skill or characteristic of this ability?
What incredible technique or stunt can you pull off?
How can you use your ability to impress and amaze?
What emotion unleashes your potential?
What is the chief tool you use when practicing your ability?
How do you prevent failure or regain the advantage with your ability?
What signature move or unique slant did you add to your repertoire?
What do you know, sense, or discern that a beginner wouldn’t?
What nearly (or truly) miraculous thing can you accomplish?
weakQ: What is a flaw or weakness of your ability you are still refining?
What bad habits or behaviors have you developed due to your ability?
Under what conditions is your ability less effective, even with your proficiency?
Who resents or harasses you because of your ability?
questIdeas: What you must do to stay the best.
Your perspective about the responsibility or burdens that come with your level of talent.
A lofty goal you have undertaken, due to your standing as a skillful exemplar.
Prodigious Ability.concept: When faced with a problem that seemingly cannot be solved with your ability, how do you act? Are you proud of your hard-earned skills, or angry that you were forced to learn what you wish you didn’t have to? Are you dismissive of people beneath your level of expertise?

powerQ: What powerful or mysterious item do you possess?
What is its most potent power or ability?
What is another aspect or part of its magic?
What do you feel when you hold, wear, or use it?
When does your Relic come to life or becomes stronger?
What skill is required to best handle the Relic?
Who or what was your Relic made to affect the most?
What is revealed to you through the use of your Relic?
What is a secret feature of the Relic that no one else knows about?
What does your Relic unlock or unleash?
weakQ: What is the most troublesome shortcoming of your Relic?
What can interfere with the powers of your Relic?
What can damage or destroy your Relic?
What has changed in you for the worse because of your Relic?
questIdeas: A task you must accomplish related to your Relic, such as to keep it working.
A vision or destiny the item pushes you towards or even requires you to fulfill.
A responsibility that comes with this item’s power, or a behavior it enables.
Relic.concept: ITEM OF MAGICAL OR SPIRITUAL POWER + STRANGE HEIRLOOM + ADVANCED ARTIFACT You possess an item of power or a mysterious artifact, which changed your life. Its enchanted nature cannot be denied – at least not by you – and its power guides or influences your decisions and actions. It might be a source of arcane power, a container for a spirit, or a relic of a bygone age. Whether you deserve, need, or are capable of controlling this power might not be important. You already have it. What you'll do and where it'll take you are the real questions. What does your relic look like? What kind of item is

powerQ: What manner of fantastical being are you?
What can you do that a human never could?
What other magic or supernatural ability do you possess?
What unusual shape, feature, or trait do you have or can assume?
What do you know or sense that mundane beings cannot?
How do you gain sustenance, draw strength, or recover?
What aura, miasma, or other unique essence do you possess or exude?
What is your natural or preferred habitat, territory, or range?
Who or what is a common ally or prey to creatures such as you?
How does your kind interact with mortal and mundane beings?
weakQ: What repels or harms your kind?
How can mortal creatures bind or manipulate you?
What is a shortcoming of your physical or magical nature?
Who hunts or antagonizes you?
questIdeas: An attitude toward human beings with whom you have a history.
An aspiration to understand where you came from, your place, or your destiny.
A necessity or proclivity of your kind, such as carousing, drinking blood, or gathering magical power.
Uncanny Being.concept: Were you born, created, cursed, or transformed into your uncanny existence? How similar is your appearance to that of a human? Can anyone tell you’re not human at a glance? Do you wish to become something else?

powerQ: What Destiny will you fulfill?
How does fate help you out when you are in danger?
What useful resource has Destiny provided you with?
Who believes in your Destiny and will do anything to help fulfill it?
What quality is the reason you were chosen for this fate?
How has your fate made your life much easier than that of others?
What useful possession of yours seems tied to your fate?
What signs, advice, intuition, or prophecy helps guide you?
What do you need most to fulfill your Destiny?
How does fate abruptly alter reality to keep you on your path?
weakQ: Who is determined to thwart your Destiny?
What essential piece are you missing to fulfill your Destiny?
What problem are you destined to face at every turn?
How has your Destiny gone to your head?
questIdeas: The ultimate goal you are destined to fulfill.
A compulsion you feel to follow certain signs, omens, intuitions, or instructions.
A strong conviction on how to conduct yourself honorably in spite of your fate.
Destiny.concept: PROPHECY + PREDETERMINED PATH + GROOMED FOR A ROLE + KNOWN FINAL DESTINATION Fate, the gods, or some unknown force – profound, sinister, or uncaring – has determined that you shall play an important role in the history of this world. This destiny seems to guide your path and bend to its will every occurrence and happenstance in your journey, trying to make you learn the right lessons, gather the right allies, and end up in the right place at the right time. It is all-pervasive – and yet you believe you still have the final choice. Why were you chosen and what for? How did you learn of your des

powerQ: State your title, or what you rule over.
What is the most common or useful use of your authority?
Who is your closest confidant, advisor, or servant?
What underlings serve you in droves?
What valuable resources does your Dominion produce regularly?
What special quality or circumstance serves you as a ruler?
Where or when is your Dominion at its strongest?
What group within your Dominion supports you most?
What ways have you devised to hold on to your power?
What is your favored tactic or strategy during conflict?
weakQ: Who seeks to usurp your power or dethrone you?
What problem plagues your Dominion?
What personal flaw have you become known for?
What dark secret do you hide?
questIdeas: Your oath or primary charge as a holder of such a high station.
The goal you’ve decided on as what you’d like to accomplish with all your power.
The activity you must engage in so that you might hold onto or expand your power.
Dominion.concept: limits? Who can you trust and who do you fear from within your immediate circle? Where do you stand between playing intrigue and staying true to yourself?

powerQ: What skill, ability, or field have you come to Master?
What supplementary skills have you become equally proficient at?
What can you do that no other practitioner can?
How can your Mastery change the world?
What specially-made tools or expert assistants are at your disposal?
What is the name of your legendary workshop, library, forge, or the like?
What can you do with incredible effectiveness, speed, or magnitude?
What is your most well-practiced technique or best-studied subject?
What awe-striking feat can you perform at your whim?
What special privileges or material benefits come with your Mastery?
weakQ: What are the inherent repercussions of practicing at your level?
How has your Mastery affected your disposition or lifestyle for the worse?
What do you ignore, because you no longer notice such trivial things?
Who feels jealous of your Mastery?
questIdeas: The most profound lesson you have learned in your work, from which you never stray.
A declaration of how you intend to use your mastery to change the world.
Your commitment to express your Mastery in a masterpiece or achievement of a lifetime.
Mastery.concept: BEST IN THE REALM + PREEMINENCE IN YOUR FIELD + WORLD-CHANGING INGENUITY You have perfected your art or vocation to the apogee of aptitude and beyond, crossing over to the realm of legend and eternal fame. Your pioneering proficiency can change the world forever, either by creating a miraculous artifact, shaping the political map, or battling the greatest forces. Every apprentice and initiate of the trade in the realm knows your name and can only dream of even remotely approaching your level. Do you pass down your knowledge or keep it to yourself? What is your ultimate masterpiece or breakthro

powerQ: What magnificent or terrifying creature are you?
What is your most prominent physical feature?
What innate magical ability do you most often wield?
What feature, move, or power enables you to affect many at once?
How do you defend yourself with magic or size?
What unique offensive capability do you possess?
What powerful emotion drives you or is rooted in your core?
What arcane truth is revealed to you that mere mortals cannot sense?
Who serves you?
What about you commands respect from lesser creatures?
weakQ: What is your blind spot, that you miss due to your size or power?
What can counteract your magic or weaken you?
What is your one weak spot or bane?
Who seeks out your destruction?
questIdeas: A golden rule all members of your monstrous kind must adhere to.
A goal you’ve chosen in order to understand or best exemplify your kind.
A monstrous activity your kind engages in, for better or worse.
Monstrosity.concept: creature in a world that fears or exalts your very existence, where your very footfall resounds as the bells of destiny. What makes you so powerful compared to others? What is your relationship with the simple people of the land? Where are you most at home? What is most precious to you? What great schemes do you plot, or what deep need drives you?

powerQ: Who is regularly at your side, supporting you?
What is your Companion’s most handy quality or skill?
How does your Companion get you out of a jam?
What activity do you and your Companion do well together?
Where do you and your Companion go to relax or to get things done?
What is your Companion’s signature move, trick, or ability?
What useful item does your Companion always have at the ready?
How does your Companion help you improve or recover, or vice versa?
What is a useful physical characteristic of your Companion?
What is your Companion’s outlook or modus operandi?
weakQ: How does your Companion get you into trouble or danger?
What is your Companion’s most annoying quality?
What causes your Companion to become unavailable?
In what situation is your Companion least useful?
questIdeas: Your commitment to your Companion, the connection between you, and their wellbeing.
A mission you and your Companion seek to accomplish together.
Your Companion’s Quest, which you have undertaken to keep them by your side.
Companion.concept: Companion Might: common, everyday, expected special, notable, or a group giant, all-powerful, or numerous Who is always there with you, and why? How did you fall in with your companion? How did you come to trust and rely upon them? What is their role in your life, your job, or your duties?

powerQ: What is your magical nature, art, or expression?
What category, field, or type of Magic do you specialize in?
What specific magical ability, maneuver, or spell do you use regularly?
What is different, better, or special about the way you use Magic?
Which personal style or flourish have you added to your Magic?
What knowledge or lore related to this form of Magic did you acquire?
In which conditions is your Magic most powerful?
What item or material do you use to empower your Magic?
What skill related to your Magic have you developed?
What social skill, trait, or benefit do you have thanks to your Magic?
weakQ: What conditions, uses, or targets are unfavorable for your Magic?
What does your Magic require in order to function well?
What are the side effects of having or using your Magic?
How does having Magic make your life harder?
questIdeas: A sacred oath, curse, or magical law that binds you.
A vision of what you could achieve if you developed your Magic.
A ritual, prayer, or practice you must perform in order to possess or replenish your Magic.
Magic.concept: Magic Might: Hedge magic of everyday tasks and small wonders True magic that can achieve fantastical things All-powerful magic that can shape the world What is the source of your power, and what are its limits? What does it demand of you, and why do you agree to pay the price? Where did you learn or gain this magic, and how? Who else can perform these miraculous acts?

powerQ: What is your most important Possession or material resource?
What useful characteristic or feature does it have?
What supplemental or related item or set do you possess?
What is the most common way you use your Possession?
What surprising secret or trick use does this item have?
What situations or conditions was this item designed for?
How do you handle, repair, or maintain your Possessions?
What emotion or memory does this Possession evoke in you?
How do you keep your Possession safe or concealed?
What is the make, style, design, or quality standard of this item?
weakQ: What is a flaw or downside of your Possession?
What causes your Possession to need repair or maintenance?
How do you overuse or abuse your Possession?
What is beyond the capabilities or standards of your Possession?
questIdeas: A routine, ritual, or relationship you must maintain to keep your Possessions.
A goal or activity the item inspires you to engage in.
An aim to improve your Possessions or obtain better versions of them.
Possessions.concept: Possessions Might: everyday, simple, unassuming unique, magical, expensive, or a wide variety major assets How have you come to own this item? Why is it important to you? Do you take pride in having it in your possession? What would you be willing to trade this item for?

Circumstance.name: Alderperson
Circumstance.quest: Oh, to watch our people thrive in peace…

Circumstance.name: Landed Noble
power: “There has always been a Stoneheart in this castle”
Circumstance.quest: Would that my house glory be restored!

Circumstance.name: Fugitive
Circumstance.quest: One day, I won’t have to run any more.

Circumstance.name: Outcast
Circumstance.quest: Will I ever be welcome among them?

Circumstance.name: Hardworking Drudge
Circumstance.quest: Eventually, all this hard work will pay off.

Circumstance.name: Tavern Brawler
Circumstance.quest: I wish something would make me forget my pain – for good!

Devotion.name: Ailing Wise Elder
Devotion.quest: What little time is left, I ought to spend it with them.

Devotion.name: Heal the Sick
Devotion.quest: I will help ALL of them.

Devotion.name: Become a Knight
Devotion.quest: I shall be a knight of the realm, serving the greater good.

Devotion.name: Our Village
Devotion.quest: This warm and welcoming home is worth every sacrifice.

Devotion.name: Childhood Sweetheart
Devotion.quest: There is nothing I would not do for this love!

Devotion.name: Ritualistic Circle
Devotion.quest: The next ritual must be held according to our customs.

Past.name: Cursed
Past.quest: I must find a way to free myself of this curse.

Past.name: Last of My Kind
Past.quest: It falls to me alone to continue the legacy of my kind.

Past.name: Mystic Pilgrimage
Past.quest: My journey into the sacred mysteries has only just begun.

Past.name: Highborn Education
Past.quest: Knowledge must be passed on, or become lost to time.

Past.name: Well-Traveled
weak: always leaves when it gets hard
Past.quest: The time has come to set out on a new journey!

People.name: Battlerider
People.quest: Ride, raid, and roar for the glory of the plains!

People.name: Highlander
People.quest: The Highlands have always stood free, even if that means alone.

People.name: Beaver Kin
People.quest: We say, find a place to build a home – then flood it with love.

People.name: Sylvan Elf
People.quest: Tread softly, as we are but the caretakers of this world.

People.name: Caravan Folk
People.quest: The lifeblood of the realm, we carry all but none care for us.

People.name: Witchblood
People.quest: Remain in the shadows and await the Reckoning.

Personality.name: Curious
Personality.quest: There’s so much more to see and learn!

Personality.name: Jovial Disposition
Personality.quest: Drink, dance, and dream, for today is all we have!

Personality.name: Practiced Liar
weak: lie when I don’t mean to
Personality.quest: Let’s see what I can get away with this time…

Personality.name: Heart of Gold
Personality.quest: There’s hardship to go around – let’s carry it together.

Personality.name: Rumormonger
Personality.quest: Whispered words are mightier than loud proclamations.

Skill or Trade.name: Artisan
Skill or Trade.quest: I shall make the finest creations this village has ever seen.

Skill or Trade.name: Homesteader
Skill or Trade.quest: I’ll gladly work myself to the bone to keep this house standing.

Skill or Trade.name: Blacksmith
Skill or Trade.quest: The forge is demanding, but it pays for a decent living.

Skill or Trade.name: Skirmisher
Skill or Trade.quest: Always strive to surprise your foe.

Skill or Trade.name: Hinterland Tracker
Skill or Trade.quest: If you wish something found in the wild, I’m your best chance.

Skill or Trade.name: Sleight of Hand
Skill or Trade.quest: Everyone’s a mark, they just don’t know it.

Trait.name: Prophetic Visions
Trait.quest: Where do these visions come from, and why do they come to me?

Trait.name: Uncommon Beauty
Trait.quest: Beauty is but a distracting glamor; it is not who I truly am.

Trait.name: Underwater Deftness
Trait.quest: Nowhere do I feel more at home than deep in the murky water.

Trait.name: Strong as an Ox
Trait.quest: The only way to get stronger is to keep testing my strength!

Duty.name: A Light Against the Dark
Duty.quest: Hold high the sacred fire so that the darkness is repelled.

Duty.name: Postal Courier
Duty.quest: “Climb every mountain, cross every river, this urgent word I safely shall deliver.”

Duty.name: Contract Work
Duty.quest: Take the coin and do the work; never one without the other.

Duty.name: Protect the Land
Duty.quest: I am the Watcher of this land – revere it, or turn back.

Duty.name: Oath of Allegiance
Duty.quest: So it was decreed by our Magnificent Liege, and so it shall be!

Duty.name: Yearns for Revenge
Duty.quest: I can never rest, not until justice is met.

Influence.name: Adored
power: let them bask in my light
Influence.quest: I need EVERYONE to love me.

Influence.name: Folk Hero
Influence.quest: These people look to me to give them hope, and so I shall.

Influence.name: Conspirator
Influence.quest: “A spider in the dark does bite, yet promptly perishes in the light.”

Influence.name: Respected Leader
Influence.quest: Our one and only goal is finally within reach. Let us conquer it!

Influence.name: [Deity]’s Favored Cleric
Influence.quest: One day, mistress, I wish to become your most faithful servant.

Influence.name: Dockmaster
Influence.quest: Nothing comes in or out of this port without me knowing about it!

Knowledge.name: Denizens of the Unseen
Knowledge.quest: Find the right one to whom I shall pass this lore, lest it be lost or misused.

Knowledge.name: Monster Lore
Knowledge.quest: If you want to survive out here, you need to know your creatures.

Knowledge.name: Expert Appraiser
Knowledge.quest: I collect only the finest wares and so I must know fine from common.

Knowledge.name: Stargazer
Knowledge.quest: Ominous is the night’s sky of late. Yet to avoid doom, I must disentangle its secrets.

Knowledge.name: Knows Every Province
Knowledge.quest: I am working on an atlas of the world…

Knowledge.name: Tales of the Ancients
Knowledge.quest: If I could remember it all, maybe I’d remember my part in it…

Prodigious Ability.name: Formidable Weaponmaster
Prodigious Ability.quest: Once drawn, a weapon may only be sheathed again after it tasted blood.

Relic.name: Bag of Enchanted Dust
Relic.quest: Sprinkle a handful of magic into every somber situation.

Relic.name: Heirloom Longsword
power: fulfill my destiny known far and wide
weak: dark legacy of my lineage With this One True Sword

Relic.name: Cauldron of Conjuration
Relic.quest: The more life I feed my cauldron, the more life I can conjure!

Relic.name: Magic Seeds
Relic.quest: If we could get a whole bag of these seeds, we could grow back Foxhollow Forest!

Relic.name: Giant’s Gauntlet
Relic.quest: The glove guides me to the kingdom of giants, where I will live as one of them!

Relic.name: Staff of Spellbinding
power: better if I know the spell
Relic.quest: Become a master over all magic.

Uncanny Being.name: Disembodied Spirit
Uncanny Being.quest: I must banish those who invade my dwelling place.

Uncanny Being.name: One of the Fair Folk
Uncanny Being.quest: Our realm needs a true hero, and I’ve been tasked to find them.

Uncanny Being.name: Hellspawn
Uncanny Being.quest: Find someone to take my place in hell.

Uncanny Being.name: Revenant
Uncanny Being.quest: I’ve come back for justice and won’t leave until I get it.

Uncanny Being.name: Little Hob
Uncanny Being.quest: As long as I get no thanks around here, you can forget about my help!

Destiny.name: Ascend the Throne
weak: no true claim to the throne
Destiny.quest: It is my birthright to cast down the tyranny of the throne and unite the people!

Destiny.name: Foretold Demise
Destiny.quest: I have seen the end; there is no way out.

Destiny.name: End the World
Destiny.quest: Just because I’m ending the world doesn’t mean I can’t be nice about it.

Destiny.name: Slay the Mighty One
Destiny.quest: Soon, my friend, I shall be the one to bring down the Beast.

Destiny.name: Find the Celestial Storyteller
Destiny.quest: I know not why, yet I feel compelled to follow the signs and turn the page over.

Destiny.name: Turn the Tides of Darkness
weak: darkness is in all of us
Destiny.quest: If we wish to turn back the darkness, we must first do so within ourselves.

Dominion.name: Archmage of the Order
Dominion.quest: We must train new mages to replace those lost to war and evil.

Dominion.name: Monarch
Dominion.quest: All who speak against the crown shall be hung or exiled.

Dominion.name: Insidious Cult Overlord
Dominion.quest: The Night Snake must touch every home before we can reveal ourselves.

Dominion.name: Otherworldly Realm
Dominion.quest: The Twilight Lands must remain hidden, or risk their fall.

Dominion.name: Merchant Guildmaster
Dominion.quest: The Guild is built on profit! Where there is no profit, there is no Guild.

Dominion.name: Terror of the Land
Dominion.quest: I am what they fear most.

Mastery.name: Ambassador of Change
weak: throw the baby out with the bathwater
Mastery.quest: A new dawn is rising, and there will be no turning back.

Mastery.name: Lord of the Hunt
Mastery.quest: Either I hunt a worthy quarry, or it’s no hunt at all.

Mastery.name: Forger of Celestial Jewels
Mastery.quest: I shall pour all light into a single gemstone, to be our new sun.

Mastery.name: Inspired Architect
power: collapse a building with one strike
Mastery.quest: The Temple of the Nine Divinities must project power and reverence.

Mastery.name: Perfected Soul
Mastery.quest: I AM. Nothing can change that.

Monstrosity.name: Archfiend of Bedlam
Monstrosity.quest: Who will be the next poor soul to let me into their world?

Monstrosity.name: Giant Spider Queen
Monstrosity.quest: Once I put out the sun, the entire world will be mine.

Monstrosity.name: Dragon
Monstrosity.quest: I am lord over these lands. Bow to me, or become my next snack!

Monstrosity.name: Elemental Titan
Monstrosity.quest: All things are mere fleeting shapes of the eternal elements, and must be reshaped again.

Monstrosity.name: Powerful Vampire
power: faster than the eye can see
Monstrosity.quest: The people of this town rather suit my palate. I’ll have more.

Companion.name: Imposing Wolfhound
power: push me out of harm’s way

Companion.name: Inspiring Master
Companion.quest: “Put all of yourself into it, I expect nothing less.”

Companion.name: Friend I Just Met
weak: too far out of their way
Companion.quest: I love to make friends but I hate when they overstay their welcome…

Companion.name: Irksome Pixie
Companion.quest: This is going to be the biggest prank YET.

Companion.name: Band of Swords
Companion.quest: All for one and one for all!

Companion.name: Guardian Spirit
Companion.quest: “Promise me that you will destroy the Warlock, and I will forever protect you.”

Magic.name: Blessing of the Goddess
Magic.quest: Be always with the Goddess, and she will always be with you.

Magic.name: One with the Dark
Magic.quest: Every sunrise, I must return to the womb of darkness, even if briefly.

Magic.name: Hex & Curse
Magic.quest: Dare to cross me, fool, and I’ll make you regret it.

Magic.name: Warding Invocations
Magic.quest: That which comes from the other side, must be returned to the other side. No exceptions.

Magic.name: Rudimentary Magic
Magic.quest: I’m going to keep practicing until I become a true wizard!

Magic.name: Grand Necromancy
Magic.quest: I shall rule this world with an army of bone and rotted flesh.

Possessions.name: Handcrafted Pan Flute
Possessions.quest: A peaceful life is all I want.

Possessions.name: Impregnable Stronghold
Possessions.quest: We will be safe here, as long as we stand our ground.

Possessions.name: Hidden Daggers
Possessions.quest: One day, one of these will slit the Baron’s throat.

Possessions.name: Pilfered Possessions
weak: I’ve used all the good stuff
Possessions.quest: Who do I have to rob around here to get a few coins?

Possessions.name: Horse & Panoply
Possessions.quest: I will bring honor to the noble house whose colors I proudly wear.

Possessions.name: Untold Riches
Possessions.quest: Everything and everyone has a price, and I can pay it.

Circumstance.name: Comfort Zone
Circumstance.desc: When you camp or sojourn in the environment of your Circumstance, you may recover one scratched power tag in addition to any other benefits.

Circumstance.name: Expected Role
Circumstance.desc:
Choose a status that represents how society expects you to behave, such as friendly, threatening, or in-charge. Once per session, before you take a social action befitting your expected role, 

you may gain this status at tier 2.

Circumstance.name: Familiar Matters
Circumstance.desc: There are things everyone in your situation knows. Once per scene, you may ask the Narrator for one important detail about a subject related to your Circumstance.

Circumstance.name: Strength From Adversity
Circumstance.desc:
Once per session, when a weakness tag from this theme is invoked, you may 

gain driven-2, which helps this roll and expires after it.

Circumstance.name: Trudging Along
Circumstance.desc:
Choose a type of status that you’ve become accustomed to given your Circumstance, such 

as tired or humiliated. Once per scene, you may ignore a status you have of that type if it is tier 3 or lower.

Devotion.name: Bodyguard
Devotion.desc: When your Devotion or a person representing it takes Consequence, you may take it instead of them (and possibly react to it), if the Narrator deems it possible.

Devotion.name: Catch Me When I Fall
Devotion.desc: Once per session, when you act with the object of your Devotion or a person representing it at your side, and the outcome is only Consequences, you may choose to Succeed as well.

Devotion.name: Deeply Committed
Devotion.desc:
Your dedication fills you with purpose. Once per scene, when you take action to 

pursue this theme’s Quest, you may first gain committed-2, which expires after that action.

Devotion.name: Goes Both Ways
Devotion.desc: Once per session, if the object of your Devotion is near, you may gain a story tag representing aid granted by them, such as an item, encouragement, knowledge, or direct help.

Devotion.name: Unwavering
Devotion.desc: Once per session, when a tag in this theme would be scratched for any reason, you may keep it unscratched instead.

Past.name: Face From The Past
Past.desc: Once per session, when you meet a character from your Past for the first time in the game, you may describe how your last meeting went and give them an appropriate tier-2 status.

Past.name: Lessons Learned
Past.desc: Once per session, when you roll a total of 6 or less, you may explain how this situation is familiar to you from your Past, reroll the dice, and take the new result.

Past.name: Not Letting Go
Past.desc: Whenever you burn a tag from this theme for Power, you can mark Abandon on any other theme instead of marking that tag as scratched.

Past.name: Put It Behind Me
Past.desc: When you Make a Sacrifice at the Scarring sacrifice level, you may forego the roll and treat it as a 7-9 instead, Success with Consequences. You must choose to replace this theme.

Past.name: Vivid Memory
Past.desc: Once per session, when a weakness tag from this theme is invoked, you may discover (ask the Narrator) or reveal (decide yourself, Narrator approves) one important detail from your Past and gain an appropriate story tag or a tier-2 emotional status.

People.name: Shared Language
People.desc: Your People respond well to your presence. Once per scene, when you socially interact with them and get both a Success and Consequences, you may choose not to take the Consequences.

People.name: Stand Out
People.desc: You are an unusual member of your People. Once per scene, when you act against your People’s habits, culture, or traditions and get both a Success and Consequences, you may choose not to take the Consequences.

People.name: True To My Tribe
People.desc: You are an exemplary member of your People. Once per scene, when acting according to your People’s habits, culture, or traditions would put you at risk or disadvantage and you still choose to do so, you may mark Improve on this theme.

People.name: Trust in Legacy
People.desc: Choose one power tag describing your People’s abilities or ways. Once per session, when you roll with this tag and get only Consequences, you may choose to Succeed as well.

People.name: Wisdom Handed Down
People.desc: You command the lore of your People. Once per scene, you may ask the Narrator for one important detail from an area of knowledge possessed by your People.

Personality.name: Adaptable Persona
Personality.desc: Once per session, when you take an action using tags from this theme and get only Consequences, you may choose to Succeed as well.

Personality.name: Big Personality
Personality.desc: When you burn power tags from this theme for Power, they add 4 Power instead of 3. Infectious Personality: When you camp or sojourn, you may give another Hero a story tag describing an aspect of your Personality (expiring any previous tag created this way).

Personality.name: Lasting Impression
Personality.desc: Once per scene, when you take a social action and Succeed, you may give a lasting impression to everyone you affect with this action.

Personality.name: Unshakeable
Personality.desc:
Once per scene, when you react to lessen social or emotional Consequences and get a total result of 7 or above, you may spend all your Power to completely avoid all Consequence Effects. 

PERSONALITY 

Curious 

learning environment, inundate 

with questions, all in my notebook, subtle inquiry, passion 

for the truth, inventive, point out peculiarities, recognize false answers, deep thinker 

ov

Skill or Trade.name: Deft Remedy
Skill or Trade.desc: Once per session, when you use tags from this theme and roll a total of 6 or less, you may reroll the dice and take the new result instead.

Skill or Trade.name: Learn from My Mistakes
Skill or Trade.desc: Once per scene, when you act using tags from this theme and don’t Succeed, mark Improve on this theme.

Skill or Trade.name: Practice Makes Perfect
Skill or Trade.desc: Choose a helpful status reflecting your use of your expertise such as alert or well-off. You may burn a tag from this theme at any time to gain that status at tier 3.

Skill or Trade.name: Rehearsed Technique
Skill or Trade.desc: When you choose this Special, choose a power tag from this theme. Whenever you burn that tag for Power, you gain 3 Power as normal and may also forgo rolling the dice and treat the dice roll total as 7 (before adding Power).

Skill or Trade.name: Resourceful
Skill or Trade.desc: When you camp or sojourn, if you dedicate your time to preparing or crafting something using your skill, you may create an extra story tag in addition to the usual benefits.

Trait.name: Innate Sense
Trait.desc: Once per session, you can ask the Narrator for one important detail that you can intuit thanks to your Trait.

Trait.name: Made for This
Trait.desc: Choose a hindering status that your Trait helps you overcome. Once per scene, you may ignore this status when you act.

Trait.name: Moment to Shine
Trait.desc: Once per session, when you act using tags from this theme, you may ignore being Imperiled, or treat being Extremely Imperiled as being Imperiled.

Trait.name: Pull Through
Trait.desc: Once per session, when you roll with tags from this theme, you may ignore any negative physical or emotional status of tier 3 or lower.

Trait.name: Wild Blood
Trait.desc: Your Trait manifests in unusual ways. Choose and gain a Special Improvement from the Uncanny Being themebook.

Duty.name: Dutiful Anticipation
Duty.desc: Once per scene, you may ask the Narrator to reveal the closest or next danger standing in your way to fulfilling your Quest. The Narrator will point you at a danger you can perceive or provide a vague clue if you cannot.

Duty.name: Grim Determination
Duty.desc:
Once per session, when you act to advance this theme’s Quest and suffer 

Consequences, you may gain determined-2 before your reaction.

Duty.name: Painful Lessons
Duty.desc: Once per session, when you act using tags from this theme and suffer Consequences, you may mark Improve on this theme.

Duty.name: Driven by Shame
Duty.desc: Once per scene, when you act using tags from this theme, you may add Power to your roll equal to Abandon currently marked on this theme.

Duty.name: Unstoppable
Duty.desc: Once per scene, when you take an action to pursue this theme’s Quest using tags from this theme and get both a Success and Consequences, you may choose not to take the Consequences.

Influence.name: Friends Everywhere
Influence.desc:
When you enter a settlement for the first time, you gain a useful contact there. You 

may name them and define their relationship with you at the Narrator’s discretion.

Influence.name: Long Reach
Influence.desc: Once per session, you can have a representative of your Influence be present anywhere they could conceivably be, and then take action as that character using tags from this theme.

Influence.name: Overextend
Influence.desc: Whenever you roll with tags from this theme and suffer a status as a Consequence, you may increase the tier of that status by 1 and gain 2 more Power to spend on Effects.

Influence.name: Read Between the Lines
Influence.desc:
Whenever you roll a reaction using tags from this theme to lessen a social or influence-related Consequence, you receive one valuable detail about the source of the Consequence. 

Special Improvements

Knowledge.name: A Known Expert
Knowledge.desc: People seek your advice. Once per session, you may gain an audience with any NPC interested in your Knowledge (Narrator’s call), without rolling, or remove from them up to 3 status tiers representing hostility or resistance.

Knowledge.name: Always Thinking
Knowledge.desc: You’re used to contemplating while doing other things. When you camp or sojourn, you may take an action in the third period using only tags from this theme without automatically suffering Consequences (if you choose to roll, you may still suffer Consequences).

Knowledge.name: Applied Expertise
Knowledge.desc: Once per session, when you spend Power to discover a valuable detail after rolling with tags from this theme, you may gain a free story tag representing a practical application of your discovery.

Knowledge.name: Inventive Stroke
Knowledge.desc: Whenever you invoke this theme’s title tag while applying your Knowledge to a practical task in a way you never have before, you get 2 Power from the tag instead of 1.

Knowledge.name: Flashes of Insight
Knowledge.desc: Whenever you encounter for the first time a place, object, creature or phenomenon that your Knowledge applies to, you may ask the Narrator to give you one valuable detail about it.

Prodigious Ability.name: Improved Counter
Prodigious Ability.desc: When you react to lessen a Consequence with tags from this theme and roll a total of 10 or higher, you may, in addition to any other benefit, keep the spotlight to counterattack and may double dip tags already used in this spotlight.

Prodigious Ability.name: Create An Opening
Prodigious Ability.desc: Once per session, when you use tags from this theme and Succeed, you may create a free tier-2 status representing an opportunity you create for an ally through your action.

Prodigious Ability.name: Discerning Eye
Prodigious Ability.desc: Once per session, when you have time and access to observe someone’s action or work, you may learn three valuable details about them through your Ability.

Prodigious Ability.name: Masterpiece
Prodigious Ability.desc: With the necessary time and resources, you can create a grand work (art, text, tool, weapon, etc.). Gain a story theme (3 positive tags, 1 negative tag) and mark a Milestone.

Prodigious Ability.name: Practiced Maneuver
Prodigious Ability.desc: Describe a maneuver you perform regularly. Once per session, when you perform it with tags from this theme and get only Consequences, you may Succeed as well.

Relic.name: Eternal Bond
Relic.desc: You can scratch a power tag from this theme to immediately retrieve your Relic from anywhere in the world. You can mark Abandon on this theme to immediately remove all statuses from your Relic or reform it.

Relic.name: Momentary Bearer
Relic.desc: Once per session, you can let another player use power tags from this theme, provided they can access and use your Relic for their action.

Relic.name: Reckless Discharge
Relic.desc: Once per session, when you act using tags from this theme, you may treat the theme as if it was one level of Might higher than it is. Mark Abandon on this theme.

Relic.name: Sentinel
Relic.desc: Choose a tier-2 status that describes how your Relic protects you, such as watchful-2, parrying-2, warded-2, or cover-2. You may gain it once per session, when you are in imminent danger.

Relic.name: Signature Move
Relic.desc: Choose a power tag from this theme and an appropriate tier-2 status that you can give using this tag. Once per session, when you use this tag in an action and Succeed, you may give this status in addition to (and after applying) the normal outcome.

Uncanny Being.name: Expressive Form
Uncanny Being.desc:
Choose a status that describes your form such as terrifying-2, eerie-2, or welcoming-2. 

You may gain it at any point once per session.

Uncanny Being.name: Repel Witchery
Uncanny Being.desc: You are unusually resistant to magic. Once per scene, when you react to lessen magical Consequences with tags from this theme and roll 6 or less, you may still spend your Power to lessen the Effects.

Uncanny Being.name: Self Discovery
Uncanny Being.desc: Once per session, when you discover a new detail about your origin, your qualities, or your abilities, mark Improve on this theme.

Uncanny Being.name: Shifting Form
Uncanny Being.desc: Once per session, you may replace one of this theme’s power tags (except the theme tag) with a new tag that represents a change in your natural abilities and qualities.

Uncanny Being.name: Strive to Belong
Uncanny Being.desc: You follow the example of your more earthly companions. Once per session, when you watch another Hero perform a mundane action, you may gain a story tag describing your imitation or understanding them.

Destiny.name: As Foretold
Destiny.desc:
Once per session, you may declare an action by you or another Hero as pivotal in the fulfillment of your Destiny. Count Power normally and, instead of rolling, treat the result as a Success with Consequences. 

 Meet It Head-On: Once per session, when you act against something preventing you from fulfilling your Destiny, you first gain a story tag or a tier-2 status that represents your readiness.

Destiny.name: Not How It Ends
Destiny.desc:
Once per session, when you take Consequences that would hinder you on the way to 

your Destiny (despaired, tired, cursed, etc.), you may avoid these Consequences completely.

Destiny.name: Reincarnation
Destiny.desc: When your Destiny finally manifests, you may remove any harmful status on you, including tier-6 statuses. This theme evolves, and you can replace any number of your other themes. You gain Promise as usual for all themes.

Destiny.name: Pull of Destiny
Destiny.desc: Once per session, you may ask the Narrator what the best way to pursue your Destiny is, and get one valuable detail.

Dominion.name: Embodiment of the Realm
Dominion.desc: You are connected to your Dominion in more than title. Any status on your Dominion is considered to apply to you as well, and any status on you is considered to apply to your Dominion.

Dominion.name: Good Help Is Hard to Find
Dominion.desc: Name an advisor, craftsman, or assistant NPC that comes with your position. Once per session, you may gain a story tag they produce for you.

Dominion.name: My Word Is Absolute
Dominion.desc: Once per session, you may gain a story tag representing a decree you have made in your Dominion (expiring any previous tag created this way). White it exists, it holds true throughout your Dominion, although it can be scratched.

Dominion.name: Regalia
Dominion.desc:
Choose a physical symbol of your position. Once per scene, when you wear, wield, or are in the 

presence of this symbol, you may gain majestic-2.

Dominion.name: Untarnished Glory
Dominion.desc: Once per session, you may remove 2 tiers of a negative status on your Dominion or recover a scratched tag in this theme.

Mastery.name: Always Prepared
Mastery.desc: Once per scene, when a broad tag from this theme is indirectly relevant to your action, you may use it as directly relevant instead, skipping the required prep action.

Mastery.name: Calculated Sacrifice
Mastery.desc: Before Making a Sacrifice at the Grave sacrifice level related to your Mastery, replace a theme other than this one that is dearest to you. You may then treat a 7-9 roll as a 10 or more result. If you Succeed, you don’t need to replace another theme – you already paid that price.

Mastery.name: Foresee the Outcome
Mastery.desc: Once per session, you may declare that an action in which you rolled a total of 9 or less (including Power) was only a prediction of an unwanted outcome and did not actually happen. Disregard the action and take a different action instead.

Mastery.name: Lifelong Insight
Mastery.desc: When you replace this theme, you may keep one of the Special Improvements you chose (except for this one) and add it to the new theme.

Mastery.name: Second Wind
Mastery.desc: Once per session, you may restore two scratched tags in this theme, at the cost of scratching one tag on another theme.

Monstrosity.name: Display of Force
Monstrosity.desc: Once per session, when you act using tags from this theme and Succeed without Consequences, your incredible display gives a tier-3 status of your choice representing amazement, respect, or fear to a crowd of impressionable onlookers or one observer not easily impressed.

Monstrosity.name: Fine Control
Monstrosity.desc: You learned how to better control your form’s unique abilities. Choose and gain a Special Improvement from the Mastery themebook.

Monstrosity.name: Invulnerability
Monstrosity.desc: Choose a power tag in this theme representing a type of physical or magical protection. You ignore all Consequences that this protection is relevant to, as long as this tag is unscratched.

Monstrosity.name: Magical Trace
Monstrosity.desc:
At the end of a scene, you may leave behind a magical trace (expiring any previous tag 

created this way). You may scratch this tag to take an action using tags from this theme as if you were at the tag’s location.

Monstrosity.name: Surge of Power
Monstrosity.desc:
Once per session, when burning a tag from this theme for Power, you may add 5 Power 

to the roll instead of 3. After the roll is resolved, you take exhausted-2. You cannot lessen this status.

Companion.name: Here For You
Companion.desc: Once per session, when you or your Companion take action to heal one another or help the other recover, mark Improve on this theme. This does not apply while camping.

Companion.name: Perfect Positioning
Companion.desc: Once per session, you can declare your Companion is positioned anywhere in the scene as long as they could get there, and give them a tier-2 status representing their advantageous position.

Companion.name: Reliable Ally
Companion.desc: Once per session, when you act alongside your Companion and get only Consequences, you may scratch a tag in this theme to Succeed as well.

Companion.name: Retaliation
Companion.desc:
Whenever anyone gives your Companion a harmful or hindering tag or status, you gain 

provoked-2, which helps actions to retaliate against the offender.

Magic.name: Scholar of Magic
Magic.desc: Once per scene, when you see someone practicing magic of the same kind you practice, you may ask the Narrator for one valuable detail about the magic they’re performing.

Magic.name: Ward Breaker
Magic.desc: Once per session, when you act against someone warded against your Magic and Succeed, you may scratch a tag or reduce by two tiers a status representing their defense, in addition to the normal outcome.

Magic.name: Rote Technique
Magic.desc: Once per session, when you use your Magic in a way you’ve used it before and get only Consequences, you may Succeed as well.

Magic.name: Reputation Precedes
Magic.desc: Choose a tier-2 status representing a reaction to your magic. Whenever you meet a character for the first time, you may give them this status, at the Narrator’s discretion.

Magic.name: Inspired Ingenuity
Magic.desc: Once per session, when you use your Magic to achieve a goal in a way you never have before, you may mark Improve on this theme.

Possessions.name: Durable
Possessions.desc: Choose a tag from this theme. Once per session, you can prevent Consequence Effects that would scratch it or give it a status of tier 3 or less.

Possessions.name: Favorite Piece
Possessions.desc:
Choose a power tag in this theme. Once per session, you may burn this tag for Power without scratching it. 

 I’m Keeping This: Choose one of your backpack tags and move it to this theme; it becomes a power tag. Once per session, you may return this tag to your backpack and pick a different one to move to this theme.

Possessions.name: Just The Thing
Possessions.desc: Once per session, you may gain a story tag that represents something useful you have on you or that you have access to, or a new use for your items.

Possessions.name: Quartermaster
Possessions.desc: Choose a power tag from this theme representing an item. Members of your Fellowship may treat it as if it were in their backpack, as long as it is possible for you to hand it to them and let them use it. (It retains the Might of this theme.)

fellowshipKits.name: Itinerant Sellswords
fellowshipKits.quest: Stay focused and stick to the plan so we can get our coin.

fellowshipKits.name: Tavern Buddies
power: big fish in a little pond
fellowshipKits.quest: Let’s just get things back to how they were, before it all went to hell.

fellowshipKits.name: Protectors Against the Dark
fellowshipKits.quest: Defend the people of this town, whatever the cost.
